result.stdout:
triconv
Copyright (c) 2023 Ken Domino
# triconv

## Summary

Test whether a file is proper Unicode.

## Description

Read a file and use the System.Text package to convert and test
unicode.

## Usage

    triconv [-f ENCODING] [-t ENCODING] [INPUTFILE...]

## Examples

    triconf -f utf-8 file.txt > /dev/null
    echo $?

## Current version

0.23.43 Fixes to trgen templates.

## License

  -f, --from-code    
  -t, --to-code      
  --version          
  --help             Display this help screen.
  --version          Display version information.
  value pos. 0
